author: toiq
description: Expand or collapse the sidebar when your mouse is hovering on the left ribbon.

manifest.description: This Obsidian plugin expands or collapses the sidebars based on mouse hovering on the ribbons.
manifest.name: Sidebar Expand on Hover

name: Sidebar Expand on Hover

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
Changes:
* Add option to enable/disable sidebar individually in plugin settings.
* Add commands to enable/disable sidebar individually.

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
This is a stable release.
Changes:
- Allowed users to pin sidebar states by double clicking on the corresponding ribbons.
- Allowed users to set and store sidebar width by dragging sidebars when pinned.
- Removed animation toggle feature. (Will be added in later release)
- Removed individual sidebar set/unset in plugin settings due of redundancy.

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
Finally!
Changes:
* Support for sidebar animation.
* Plugin setting tab to enable or disable individual sidebar animation and option to set individual sidebar width.

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
This release should be stable. 
Changes:
* Fixed plugin not working on first load.
* Fixed issues with plugin not unloading properly.
releases.name: 0.2.0: First Stable Release

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
This is a minor release:
Changes:
* Fixed plugin not working correctly in "empty state"
releases.name: 0.1.1: Bug fix

releases.author: toiq
releases.description:
This is the initial release for this plugin:
- Basic Functionality should work as expected.
- Transition animation is not available in this release.
releases.name: 0.1.0: Initial Release
